title: RSS Feed Into Monday.com
excerpt: I am trying to bring in RSS feeds into Monday.com to perform some automation actions. What is the best way to do this?

posts.author: Drewg (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to bring in RSS feeds into Monday.com to perform some automation actions. What is the best way to do this?

posts.author: rkaplan (Richard Kaplan)
posts.cookedHtml:
One approach would be to subscribe to the RSS feeds using the email address for your board so the items are delivered right to Monday.com - that is probably the simplest approach.

Alternatively you could use Make.com or Zapier.com with your RSS reader to add a new Monday.com item when a new feed item is published.

posts.author: Drewg (Drew)
posts.cookedHtml: I need to pull from the feed. As Upwork doesn’t have you setup email alerts for your searches. So that being said make.com or Zapier is your best way?

posts.author: FrancisElliott (Francis Elliott)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Drew,

Setting up an integration with make.com or Zapier is definitely a viable approach.

In general, Zapier is more user friendly, while make.com allows for more possibilities and becomes easier to manage as that complexity grows. Please feel free to reach out if you need help with either! (flyingravendesign@gmail.com)
